mapper.select: SELECT /* base.sy :: SyProp :: selectById */ p.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_pt.code_label AS prop_type_cd_nm FROM shopjoy_2604.sy_prop p LEFT JOIN shopjoy_2604.sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = p.site_id LEFT JOIN shopjoy_2604.sy_code cd_pt ON cd_pt.code_grp = 'PROP_TYPE' AND cd_pt.code_value = p.prop_type_cd WHERE p.prop_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(p.*) /* base.sy :: SyProp :: selectPageCount */ FROM shopjoy_2604.sy_prop p
